report.summary: Audited 2 new learn guides (Tokenized Real Estate, Web3 Gaming & GameFi) for UX consistency — normalized responsive typography, fixed hardcoded colors, added scroll hints, upgraded related articles to rich cards, added missing disclaimer and related articles to gaming page, and standardized badge borders across both pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Tokenized Real Estate: Normalized all H2 headings from fixed 26px to responsive clamp(22px, 4vw, 28px) for consistent mobile/desktop sizing
Tokenized Real Estate: Replaced 12+ hardcoded #c9d1d9 paragraph colors with #e6edf3 theme variable for WCAG AA contrast compliance
Tokenized Real Estate: Added mobile scroll hint '↔ Scroll horizontally' above platforms comparison table with WebkitOverflowScrolling touch support
Tokenized Real Estate: Upgraded related articles from minimal arrow-links to rich cards with descriptions matching cross-page design pattern
Tokenized Real Estate: Added border styling to category badges (RWA, Intermediate) matching gaming page pattern for visual consistency
Web3 Gaming: Fixed H1 from fixed 48px to responsive clamp(28px, 5vw, 48px) preventing text overflow on narrow mobile viewports
Web3 Gaming: Fixed H2 from fixed 32px to responsive clamp(22px, 4vw, 28px) matching cross-page standard
Web3 Gaming: Added related articles section with 5 rich card links to related guides (Real Estate, NFT Lending, Airdrops, Memecoin, L2)
Web3 Gaming: Added missing NFA disclaimer notice at page bottom matching real estate page pattern
Web3 Gaming: Added Link import from next/link for related articles navigation

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: tokenized-real-estate-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — already existed from build cycle, verified correct path in metadata
OG image: learn-web3-gaming-gamefi-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — already existed from build cycle with gaming/GameFi/P2E badges, stat cards, green accent gradient

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Resolved)
items: Inconsistent H2 sizing across pages (26px real estate vs 32px gaming) — FIXED to responsive clamp()
Non-responsive H1 on gaming page (48px fixed) — FIXED to clamp(28px, 5vw, 48px)
Hardcoded #c9d1d9 colors in real estate page reduce contrast on dark backgrounds — FIXED to #e6edf3
No scroll hint on real estate platforms table (6 columns, 800px min-width) — FIXED with visible hint
Gaming page missing related articles section — FIXED with 5 rich card links
Gaming page missing NFA/disclaimer — FIXED with standard disclaimer block
Badge styling inconsistency (no borders on real estate, borders on gaming) — FIXED with matching border

sections.title: Build Note
items: DISK SPACE CRITICAL: VM disk is completely full — bash commands cannot execute (ENOSPC on temp dir creation). All edits performed via Edit tool only. Build verification could not be run. Recommend clearing .next build cache before next cycle.
